entries.intro: I heard there's been some trouble down the road. Nothing specific, just talk.
details: A trader mentioned it in passing. Said the road felt off somehow.
Could be nothing. People talk, and talk gets bigger every time it changes hands.
reactions: I'm not losing sleep over it. But I'm not walking that way after dark either.

entries.intro: My neighbor came back from an errand the other day looking rattled. Wouldn't say much about it.
details: She just said the path felt wrong and she turned around early. That's all I got out of her.
She's not the nervous type either. She's walked that road a hundred times.
reactions: Probably spooked herself. Happens to the best of us when it's quiet out there.

statCheck.pass: The brush has gotten thick along that stretch. Easy to hear things moving and not see what it is.
statCheck.fail: I wouldn't know what to make of it. I don't go out there much.

entries.intro: Heard some noise out past the edge of town last night. Probably just animals, but it carried a long way.
details: Sounded like something knocking around in the brush. Rhythmic, almost.
I shut the window and went back to bed. What else are you going to do?
reactions: It's always louder at night. Your mind fills in the rest.

statCheck.pass: Could be deer rubbing antlers on the trees. They do that this time of year. Sounds stranger than you'd think.
statCheck.fail: No idea what it was. Could've been anything.

entries.intro: A couple of folks have been taking the long way around lately. I asked why and got a shrug.
details: One of them said she just didn't like the feel of it. Couldn't explain what she meant.
The other one mumbled something about tracks he didn't recognize. Didn't seem too worried, just cautious.
reactions: If two people avoid a road on the same week, I take notice. Doesn't mean I know what to do about it.

statCheck.pass: Predators move through that area sometimes when the seasons shift. They don't stay long.
statCheck.fail: I'm no tracker. If there's something out there I wouldn't know the difference.

entries.intro: You know, I took a walk this morning and it was actually quite peaceful. All that worry for nothing.
details: Birds were out, the air was nice. Felt a little silly for being nervous about it.
I think people get into a mood and then everything seems dangerous. It's contagious.
reactions: Nice to be proven wrong for once. I'll take a boring walk over an exciting one any day.
